    "Rate limits can be set per API endpoint and per client API key.",
    "Requests exceeding the limit receive HTTP 429 responses with appropriate retry-after headers.",
    "Limits are configurable via a central configuration file or admin UI without code changes."

  "priority": "Critical",
  "labels": [
    "backend",
    "performance",
    "security"
  ],
  "dependencies": [],

}
